---
page_title: rfc3339_parse function reference
description: The `rfc3339_parse` function parses an RFC 3339 timestamp into date and time values for Packer templates.
---

# `rfc3339_parse` function

`rfc3339_parse` parses an RFC 3339 timestamp string and returns an object with
its date and time values.

```hcl
rfc3339_parse(TIMESTAMP)
```

The function accepts timestamps that use either `T` or a space between the date
and time. It also accepts optional fractional seconds.

## Example

```hcl
locals {
  timestamp = rfc3339_parse("2023-07-25T23:43:16Z")
  epoch     = local.timestamp.unix
}
```

The result includes the following attributes:

| Attribute | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `year` | Calendar year. |
| `year_day` | Day of the year. |
| `month` | Month number. |
| `month_name` | Full month name. |
| `day` | Day of the month. |
| `weekday` | Day of the week, where Sunday is `0`. |
| `weekday_name` | Full weekday name. |
| `hour` | Hour in 24-hour time. |
| `minute` | Minute of the hour. |
| `second` | Second of the minute. |
| `unix` | Unix timestamp in seconds. |
| `iso_year` | ISO 8601 week-numbering year. |
| `iso_week` | ISO 8601 week number. |

## Related functions

- [`unix_timestamp_parse`](/packer/docs/templates/hcl_templates/functions/datetime/unix_timestamp_parse) converts a Unix timestamp into date and time values.
- [`formatdate`](/packer/docs/templates/hcl_templates/functions/datetime/formatdate) formats an RFC 3339 timestamp string.
